calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Conroe ISD in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Conroe Independent School District in 2026-2027 is Wednesday, August 12, 2026 — one day earlier than the 2025-2026 start of August 13. Instructional days increase from 172 to 173. Back-to-school preparation should be complete by August 8–9; August heat in Montgomery County regularly exceeds 100°F during the opening weeks of school, and UIL heat protocols apply to outdoor athletic practices.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Conroe ISD in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Conroe Independent School District in 2026-2027 is Thursday, May 27, 2027 — an early release day covering 173 instructional days. Memorial Day 2027 falls May 31, after the school year ends. The May 27 last day is five days later than 2025-2026's May 22 end date. Summer programs and childcare starting May 28 or later align with the Conroe ISD end date.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring Break for Conroe ISD in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break for Conroe Independent School District in 2026-2027 runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027 — five days. This is one week later than 2025-2026's March 9-13 window. Conroe ISD and Houston ISD set their calendars independently; verify both before booking travel. George Bush Intercontinental Airport (IAH) departure demand during spring break week is significant — book IAH flights before February regardless of which week Conroe ISD breaks.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Conroe ISD have Good Friday off in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: No. Good Friday is not a scheduled Student Holiday or school closure in Conroe ISD's 2026-2027 calendar. This is a significant change from 2025-2026, when both Good Friday (April 3) and Easter Monday (April 6) were Student Holidays, creating a four-day Easter break. In 2026-2027, neither date is a school holiday. Easter Sunday 2027 falls March 28 — the week after Spring Break ends March 19. Families who planned their Easter weekend around the prior year's four-day break should check the 2026-2027 calendar specifically before making travel arrangements.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Winter Break end for Conroe ISD in 2026-2027, and when do students return?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break for Conroe ISD in 2026-2027 runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Tuesday, January 5, 2027. Students return Wednesday, January 6, 2027. The first semester closes with an early release day on December 18 — the last instructional day before Winter Break. IAH holiday travel peaks the weekend before December 21 and the days after New Year's; book holiday flights once the calendar is confirmed.

calendarFaqs.q: What is the March 29, 2027 'Inclement Weather Make-Up Day' on the Conroe ISD calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: March 29, 2027 is designated as an Inclement Weather Make-Up Day — a school day held in reserve to replace instructional days lost to weather closures (hurricane, flooding, winter storm) earlier in the year. Under Texas Education Agency guidelines, districts can designate a limited number of weather days without mandatory makeup; beyond that threshold, missed days must be rescheduled. If no weather closures require makeup by late March, Conroe ISD may convert March 29 to a student holiday. The district typically announces by late February whether the day will be used. Families with travel plans for the weekend of March 27-30 should monitor official CISD communications to confirm the status of March 29.

yearNumbers.label: Days Up
yearNumbers.detail: Conroe ISD increases instructional days from 172 to 173 in 2026–2027 — one additional school day compared to 2025–2026. Texas Education Agency guidelines require 75,600 annual instructional minutes rather than a fixed 180-day count; Conroe ISD meets this requirement through 173 full days plus early release days counted proportionally. The extra day does not shift the first or last day dramatically — August 12 start and May 27 end bracket a school year that runs one calendar day longer. Families planning end-of-summer travel should be back in the Greater Houston area by August 8–9 regardless; UIL heat protocols during the first weeks of school affect outdoor athletic schedules from day one.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Later
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break in 2026–2027 moves one week later — March 15–19 instead of March 9–13 in 2025–2026. The later window aligns Conroe ISD with Dallas ISD and Fort Worth ISD that week, and falls closer to the Houston ISD spring break window than in prior years — though Conroe ISD and Houston ISD set calendars independently and may or may not align in any given year. IAH departure demand during the Conroe ISD spring break week depends partly on whether Houston ISD breaks the same week; if they align, IAH departure concentration is higher and fares rise faster. Book IAH flights for the March 15 week by February regardless, as spring break demand from the Greater Houston metro accumulates early.

yearNumbers.label: Easter Holidays Removed
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday (March 26) and Easter Monday are not student holidays in Conroe ISD 2026–2027 — a direct reversal of 2025–2026, when both were Student Holidays creating a four-day Easter break. Easter Sunday 2027 falls March 28 — just nine days after Spring Break ends March 19 — but the week of March 22–26 is a regular school week with only the Student Holiday on March 26 providing any Easter-adjacent break. Families who planned Easter weekend travel in prior years based on the Good Friday + Easter Monday arrangement need to recalibrate specifically for 2026–2027: there is no school closure on Good Friday, and the March 26 Student Holiday is the only break in the Easter week. Neighboring districts (Klein ISD, Spring ISD) set their Easter holiday policies independently — verify each district's calendar before booking.

yearNumbers.label: Make-Up Day Reserved
yearNumbers.detail: March 29, 2027 is designated as an Inclement Weather Make-Up Day — a school day held in reserve to replace instructional days lost to weather closures (hurricane, flooding, winter storm, or extended power outage) earlier in the year. Under TEA guidelines, Conroe ISD can absorb a limited number of weather closures without mandatory makeup; beyond that threshold, missed days must be rescheduled. If no makeup is required, the district may convert March 29 to a student holiday — announcements typically come by late February. Families with spring travel planned around the weekend of March 27–30 (Easter weekend, since Easter Sunday falls March 28) should monitor official CISD communications for the status of March 29 before booking non-refundable flights.

calendarNotes:
Conroe ISD begins the 2026–2027 school year on Wednesday, August 12, 2026 — one day earlier than the prior year's August 13 start. Instructional days increase by one from 172 to 173, and teachers work 187 days. The district meets the Texas Education Agency's 75,600 annual instructional minutes requirement through a combination of full school days and early release days. The first day of school falls during peak Texas summer heat, with UIL heat protocols governing outdoor athletic practices on days when conditions exceed established thresholds.

The fall semester runs without a structured fall break week. Student Holidays are distributed across the semester instead: October 9 and 12 create a Columbus Day long weekend (Friday-Monday), and November 2 and 3 add two no-school days about three weeks before Thanksgiving. Thanksgiving Break covers the full school week (November 23–27); students return November 30. These Student Holidays fall outside the standard federal holiday calendar and are easy to miss — download the official Conroe ISD calendar and mark each one before September.

Spring Break 2026–2027 runs March 15–19 — one week later than 2025–2026's March 9–13. Notably, neither Good Friday (March 26) nor Easter Monday (March 29) appears as a Student Holiday in 2026–2027, a direct contrast with 2025–2026's four-day Easter break. Easter Sunday 2027 falls March 28; the school week of March 22–26 is a regular school week, with only the Student Holiday on March 26 providing any Easter-adjacent break. Families who travel for Easter based on the prior year's calendar should review 2026–2027 specifically.

A date worth watching: March 29, 2027 is designated as an Inclement Weather Make-Up Day. If Conroe ISD has used weather closure days that require makeup, March 29 becomes a school day. If not, the district may convert it to a student holiday — announcements typically come by late February. Winter Break runs December 21 through January 5; first semester closes with an early release on December 18. The school year ends May 27, 2027 (early release). Memorial Day 2027 (May 31) falls after the school year ends.
